summary: Pricing conflict resolved. The '$49/mo, 10 tickets' figure cited by QA does not appear in the original ticket or any prior agent artifact — it is untraced. The UI/UX agent's $79/mo Pro specification (from artifacts/ui-specs/components.md) is the only documented pricing in the pipeline and is adopted as canonical. No changes to the current PricingSection.tsx implementation are required for pricing. Produced authoritative pricing decision document, user stories (3 stories, 10 acceptance criteria), and scope breakdown.

metadata.conflict_verdict: UI/UX spec ($79/mo) is canonical. '$49/mo' source is untraced — does not appear in original ticket or any artifact.
